text:
Intermediate care — level II 
7 = Subacute inpatient (revenue 
code 019X required) (formerly 
Intermediate care — level III) 
8 = Swing bed 
For facility type code 7 (clinics): 

1 = Rural Health Clinic (RHC) 
2 = Hospital based or independent 
renal dialysis facility 
3 = Free-standing provider based 
federally qualified health 
center (FQHC) 
4 = Other Rehabilitation Facility 
(ORF) 
 5 = Comprehensive Rehabilitation 
Center (CORF) 
6 = Community Mental Health 
Center (CMHC) 
7 = Federally
